criteria.name: Personalization
criteria.description: The app's ability to tailor content, recommendations, and features to individual user needs and preferences using AI.

criteria.name: AI-Powered Features
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes AI to provide unique and valuable functionalities, such as personalized coaching, data analysis, and real-time feedback.

criteria.name: Data Analysis
criteria.description: The capability of the app to analyze user data from various sources (e.g., health devices, activity trackers, user input) to provide actionable insights and recommendations.

criteria.name: Integration
criteria.description: How well the app integrates with other devices, platforms, and services to enhance the user experience and provide a comprehensive lifestyle solution.

criteria.name: Behavioral Strategy
criteria.description: The use of psychology principles to encourage users to adopt healthier habits
